summary: INR-NOTIF-001 passes all 6 hard gates; DCR-NOTIF-001 confirmed Frozen, hypothesis register contains 3 hypotheses with all evidence fields (1 Confirmed, 2 Refuted), diagnostic trail has 9 chronologically ordered steps with date-and-time timestamps and substantive findings, probable cause stated with evidence reference, immediate actions documented with restoration confirmed at specific metrics, and open questions explicitly listed.

warnings.description: Open question 1 (why did the 17-day latency occur) is noted but does not have a documented owner or resolution plan. This is appropriate for the INR — it is an open investigation question, not a corrective action. The PMR should address this gap in its root cause analysis.
